pages.title: Deprecated since R55
pages.text: $(c)$(l)Handheld magic circles are no longer functional.$()$(br2)Sixteen old items (Arcane / Eldritch / Inferno / Glacial / ...) remain in saves for backward compatibility, but right-clicking them has no effect.$(br2)They are hidden from the creative inventory.

pages.title: Why They Were Replaced
pages.text: Handheld circles were transient: cast �?fade. They could not be moved, automated, or tied to mana logistics.$(br2)Since R45 the circle system was rebuilt as $(l)multiblock infrastructure$(): a persistent $(l)Circle Core$() block + rune stones + structure tier validation.

pages.title: Migration
pages.text: Replace any handheld circle in your inventory by:$(br)1. Crafting $(l)circle_core_dormant$() and rune stones$(br)2. Building the $(l)T1 Initiate Circle$() pattern$(br)3. Placing the core at center; using the $(l)Attunement Chisel$() to validate$(br2)Old item NBT (mc_power, mc_duration, etc.) is not migrated automatically; salvage materials and restart with the new system.
